RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0006 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: Sunrise Motors VIN: VIN96208AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Honda 320i base 1 30,818 30,818 2 Destination fee 1 1,190 1,190 3 Options package 1 1,403 1,403 4 Doc fee 1 380 380 5 Tax 1 1,664 1,664 Total: $35,455
